pokemon:kartana.name: Kartana
pokemon:kartana.summary: One of the Ultra Beast life-forms, it was observed cutting down a gigantic steel tower with one stroke of its blade.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: One of the Ultra Beast life-forms, it was observed cutting down a gigantic steel tower with one stroke of its blade.
This Ultra Beast came from the Ultra Wormhole. It seems not to attack enemies on its own, but its sharp body is a dangerous weapon in itself.
Although it’s alien to this world and a danger here, it’s apparently a common organism in the world where it normally lives.
This Ultra Beast’s body, which is as thin as paper, is like a sharpened sword.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: One of the Ultra Beast life-forms, it was observed cutting down a gigantic steel tower with one stroke of its blade.
